practicals.title: Practical 1: Expert System using Rule-Based Systems
practicals.desc: Develop an expert system that provides simple decision making using rule-based systems.

practicals.title: Practical 2: BFS and DFS Maze Solver
practicals.desc: Implement AI search algorithms such as Breadth First Search and Depth First Search to solve maze problems.

practicals.title: Practical 3: A* Search Algorithm
practicals.desc: Implement A* algorithm to solve AI search problems using graph search techniques.

practicals.title: Practical 4: Constraint Satisfaction Problem
practicals.desc: Implement a solution for constraint satisfaction problems such as map coloring, Sudoku, or timetable scheduling using backtracking and constraint propagation.

practicals.title: Practical 5: Minimax Algorithm
practicals.desc: Understand and implement the Minimax algorithm for two-player deterministic games.

practicals.title: Practical 6: Minimax with Alpha-Beta Pruning
practicals.desc: Enhance Minimax algorithm using Alpha-Beta pruning to reduce computation time.

practicals.title: Practical 7: ChatGPT Usage
practicals.desc: Assignment and practice of ChatGPT and its applications.

practicals.title: Practical 8: SORA Usage
practicals.desc: Assignment and practice of SORA for AI-based content generation.

practicals.title: Practical 9: AI Image Generator
practicals.desc: Assignment and practice of AI image generation tools.

practicals.title: Practical 10: Prompt Engineering
practicals.desc: Assignment and practice of prompt engineering to craft effective prompts for AI systems.
